name: Death by Chocolate
recipeIngredient: 3 packages chocolate mousse mix (Nestles makes a good one)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake brownies according to package directions.
2. Allow the brownies to cool completely.
3. Poke holes in the cooled brownies using a fork.
4. Pour Kahlua over the brownies and set aside.
5. Prepare the chocolate mousse mix according to package directions; chill.
6. Break the Heath Bars into small pieces.
7. In a trifle bowl, break up half of the cooled brownies and place them in the bottom of the bowl.
8. Cover the brownies with half of the chilled chocolate mousse.
9. Layer half of the broken Heath Bars over the mousse.
10. Add half of the Cool Whip on top.
11. Repeat steps 7-10 to layer the remaining ingredients.
12. Cover the trifle bowl and refrigerate.
(Can be made up to 48 hours ahead and is better after 10-12 hours)
